hero.title: Kopa morero oa phihlello
hero.lead: IATF e hlahloba likopo tsa merero ea phihlello e qalang ka tlhoko ea 'nete.
support: Ha u hloke tlhaloso e feletseng. Bothata bo hlakileng, hore na bo ama mang, le hore na ke hobane'ng ha bo le bohlokoa bo lekane ho qala.

actions.label: Sebelisa Discord ho e-na le hoo

header.title: Khetha tsela e bonolo ka ho fetisisa

intro: Litsela tsohle li hlahlojoa ka tsela e tšoanang.

items.label: Sebaka sa marang-rang
items.body: Sebelisa foromo e ka tlaase mona ho romela kōpo e hlophisitsoeng.

items.label: E-mail
items.body: Romela kopo ka ho toba ho {{contact.requestsEmail}}Likōpo tsa melaetsa ea elektronike li ka fetoha litlaleho tsa sechaba tsa likōpo ka mor'a hore li hlahlojoe le ho hlakoloa.

items.label: Ho se lumellane
items.body: Qala moo haeba ho le bonolo. Kopo e ntse e fetela tlhahlobisong e tšoanang.

guidance.title: Pele u romela kōpo
paragraphs: Likopo li ka akaretsoa le ho phatlalatsoa e le litlaleho tsa likopo tsa sechaba mokhatlong oa IATF GitHub, webosaeteng ena, kapa ka bobeli.

U se ke ua kenyelletsa liaterese tsa botho, linomoro tsa thelefono, lintlha tsa bongaka, kapa boitsebiso bo khethollang motho ka mong ea sebelisang theknoloji e thusang ntle le haeba ho hlokahala 'me u lumellana le hore IATF e bo hlahlobe.
IATF e tlosa lintlha tse sa hlokahaleng tsa ho ikopanya le batho pele e phatlalatsa litlaleho tsa likopo.

review.title: Litebello tsa tlhahlobo
paragraphs: Ho romela kōpo ha ho tiise hore e tla amoheloa.
IATF e hlahloba likōpo tsa ho tšoaneleha ha mosebetsi, ho khoneha ha oona, molemo oa oona, le hore na mosebetsi oo ke oa polokelo ea sechaba.
Likōpo tse ling li ka' na tsa haneloa, tsa chechisetsoa morao, kapa tsa fetoloa pele li amoheloa.

fields.name: mokopi
fields.label: Lebitso la hao kapa la mokgatlo wa hao
fields.helper: Ke mang ea etsang kōpo eo?

fields.name: tsela ea ho ikopanya
fields.label: Tsela e khethiloeng ea ho ikopanya
fields.helper: Ho latela-pele ho lokela ho etsahala joang?

fields.name: ho ikopanyaDintlha
fields.label: Lintlha tsa puisano
fields.helper: Aterese ea lengolo-tsoibila kapa lebitso la Discord bakeng sa ho latela.
fields.placeholder: Aterese ea lengolo-tsoibila kapa lebitso la Discord

fields.name: puo
fields.label: Puo e buuoang
fields.helper: Puo eo u e ratang, haeba ho hlokahala.

fields.name: bothata
fields.label: U leka ho rarolla bothata bofe?
fields.helper: Hlalosa tšitiso eo ka mantsoe a bonolo.

fields.name: Basebedisi ba amehileng
fields.label: Ke bo-mang ba amehileng?
fields.helper: See se ne se tla thusa mang?

fields.name: moelelo oa extraContext
fields.label: Moelelo o eketsehileng
fields.helper: Fana ka ntho leha e le efe e 'ngoe e thusang ho hlalosa tlhokahalo: hore na ke hobane'ng ha e le ea bohlokoa, mehlala, litšupiso, khopolo e thata ea software, kapa lithibelo tsa nako.

fields.name: openSourceConsent
fields.label: Na u ikutloa u phutholohile ka nts'etsopele ea mohloli o bulehileng oa sechaba?
fields.helper: Merero e amoheloang ke polokelo ea sechaba tlas'a IATF.

header.title: Seo ho amohela ho se bolelang

items: polokelo ea sechaba mokhatlong oa IATF GitHub
moenjiniere ea ikarabellang ea abetsoeng morero
laesense ea copyleft bakeng sa khoutu le thepa ea projeke

header.title: Kopo e khutšoanyane, e hlakileng e lekane ho qala

paragraphs: Haeba u e-na le tlhoko ea sebele ea phihlello 'me u nahana hore e lokela ho ba morero oa sechaba, e romelle ho rōna.
